All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
HealthController
Health check endpoint.
JeuChasseAnomalies
JPA entity for anomaly hunt games.
JeuChasseAnomaliesRepository
Repository for anomaly hunt games.
JeuController
REST controller for game content (quizz, anomalies, swiper, mytho).
JeuQuizz
JPA entity for quiz games.
JeuQuizzRepository
Repository for quiz games.
JeuService
Service layer for all game content types.
JeuSwiper
JPA entity for swiper games.
JeuSwiperRepository
Repository for swiper games.
OpenApiConfig
OpenAPI and CORS configuration for the REST API.
Profil
JPA entity for user profiles.
ProfilController
REST controller for account management and points.
ProfilRepository
Repository for profile persistence.
ProfilService
Service layer for profile management.
QuestionMytho
JPA entity for mytho questions.
QuestionMythoRepository
Repository for mytho questions.
ReponseMytho
JPA entity for mytho answers.
ReponseMythoRepository
Repository for mytho answers.
SpecialWeekApplication
Application entry point for the Special Week backend.
TypeQuestionQuizz
JPA entity for quiz question types.
TypeQuestionQuizzRepository
Repository for quiz question types.
